title: Additional IP
titleBis: Bring more flexibility to your applications with Additional IPs.
description: Many OVHcloud products come with preconfigured static IPv4/IPv6 addresses. For significant flexibility and increased availability, these products can also be used with public Additional IPs.
descriptionBis: You can assign an Additional IP (individual address or block) to any compatible service within the same campus. A campus is a group of data centers sharing the same geographical location. For more information, please refer to our dedicated page:
guide1Description: Learn how to add Additional IP addresses to your instance's configuration
guide2Title: Configure your IP as an alias
guide2Description: Learn how to add Additional IPs to your configuration
guide3Title: Configure the network on Proxmox VE
guide3Description: Learn how to configure the network on Proxmox VE
guide4Title: Concepts - Additional IP or Floating IP on Public Cloud
guide4Description: Learn how to use public IP addresses within the Public Cloud network
guide5Title: Configure an Additional IPv6 block in a vRack
guide5Description: Learn how to set up an Additional IPv6 block in an OVHcloud vRack
advantage1Description: easily assign and move IP addresses between OVHcloud services: VPS, Bare Metal, Public Cloud, vRack network, IPLB, etc.
advantage2Description: your customers can reach your services using both IPv4 and IPv6 address types. This option provides native end-to-end connectivity for performance and support for next-generation IP protocol (available via the vRack network).
advantage3Description: expand your project to a global audience by leveraging additional geolocated IPs. By enabling geolocation of IPs in a specific country, you improve the SEO of your projects in major search engines (e.g., SEO performance).
advantage4Description: use additional IPs for load balancing, clustering, or high availability configurations with the VRRP protocol in dual configurations (IPv4 and IPv6), available only via the vRack network.
advantage5Description: import your IP blocks and use them within OVHcloud as additional IPs! (BYOIPv6 coming soon). Learn more about BYOIP
optionsAddressTypesIpv4: Unique IP address (/32) IP block (between /30 and /24)
optionsCostIpv4: From { } prices from Agora { } € per IP
optionsCompatibleServicesIpv4: Bare Metal Cloud Public Cloud Hosted Private Cloud IP Load Balancer Any service compatible with vRack
optionsFootnote: The availability of a particular type or mode of IP may vary and is linked to a specific service to which this Additional IP will be associated.
geolocationNote: The IP geolocation function corresponds to mapping an IP address to the actual geographical location (country) and is independent of where the service is actually hosted (region).
moreInfoText: You can find more information about Additional IP on our
moreInfoDocPages: search for them via our documentation pages
